description_long: This is a classic city bicycle featuring a light mint green frame with a traditional diamond geometry. The bicycle is equipped with two large, thin wheels with silver spokes and black tires, suitable for urban commuting. The handlebars are a light brown color, matching the standard saddle seat, both of which appear to be made of leather or faux leather for comfort. The central frame includes a prominent, enclosed section, possibly for battery storage or added structural support, finished in a matte gray. The pedals are black and flat, and the bike lacks any visible basket or rack attachments. Overall, the design is streamlined and elegant, ideal for everyday use in city environments.
description: A mint green city bicycle with a diamond frame, brown leather-style handlebars and saddle, and thin black tires. It features a sleek, enclosed central frame and no basket or rack.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full diamond frame, both wheels, brown saddle, and handlebars, with the enclosed gray central section clearly visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the width of the handlebars, the brown saddle, and the narrow profile of the wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the same features visible but from the left side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the brown saddle, the rear wheel, and the straight alignment of the frame and handlebars.
